papers.title: ViewSplat: View-Adaptive Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Scene Rendering
papers.summary: We present ViewSplat, a novel approach that adaptively adjusts Gaussian primitives based on viewing direction to improve rendering quality in dynamic scenes. Our method achieves real-time performance while maintaining high fidelity.

papers.title: GaussFusion: Geometry-Aware Video Generation with 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: GaussFusion combines 3D Gaussian Splatting with video generation models to create geometry-consistent video content. We demonstrate significant improvements in temporal coherence and spatial accuracy.

papers.title: MoRGS: Motion Reasoning in Gaussian Splatting for Dynamic Scene Understanding
papers.summary: MoRGS introduces motion reasoning capabilities into 3D Gaussian Splatting, enabling better understanding and reconstruction of dynamic scenes with complex motion patterns.

papers.title: LiveWorld: Generative Video World Models with Gaussian Representations
papers.summary: LiveWorld presents a generative framework that uses 3D Gaussian Splatting as the underlying representation for building video world models, enabling consistent long-horizon video generation.

papers.title: SparseGS: Sparse Gaussian Splatting for Efficient Large-Scale Scene Reconstruction
papers.summary: SparseGS introduces a sparsity-aware formulation of 3D Gaussian Splatting that significantly reduces memory requirements while maintaining reconstruction quality for large-scale environments.

papers.title: GaussianFlux: Real-Time 4D Reconstruction with Dynamic Gaussian Primitives
papers.summary: GaussianFlux enables real-time 4D scene reconstruction by representing dynamic scenes as evolving Gaussian primitives, achieving state-of-the-art results on dynamic scene benchmarks.

papers.title: HDR-GS: High Dynamic Range 3D Gaussian Splatting for Challenging Lighting
papers.summary: HDR-GS extends 3D Gaussian Splatting to handle extreme lighting conditions by incorporating HDR-aware rendering and optimization strategies.

papers.title: Neural-GS: Neural Network Enhanced Gaussian Splatting Optimization
papers.summary: Neural-GS combines neural networks with Gaussian Splatting to improve optimization speed and quality, particularly for challenging scenes with texture-less regions.

papers.title: GS-SLAM: Gaussian Splatting for Visual SLAM Applications
papers.summary: GS-SLAM integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting into visual SLAM pipelines, enabling real-time dense mapping with improved accuracy and efficiency compared to traditional methods.

papers.title: UrbanGS: Large-Scale Urban Scene Reconstruction with Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: UrbanGS presents a scalable approach for reconstructing large urban environments using hierarchical Gaussian Splatting with level-of-detail management.

papers.title: GaussianAvatar: Photorealistic Human Avatars with 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: GaussianAvatar creates photorealistic animatable human avatars using 3D Gaussian Splatting, achieving real-time rendering with detailed geometry and appearance.

papers.title: FastGS: Accelerated Training for 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: FastGS introduces novel acceleration techniques for training 3D Gaussian Splatting models, reducing training time by 5x while maintaining quality.

papers.title: GS-Distill: Knowledge Distillation for Compact Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: GS-Distill applies knowledge distillation to create compact Gaussian Splatting models suitable for mobile devices without significant quality loss.

papers.title: SemanticGS: Semantic Understanding in 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: SemanticGS incorporates semantic segmentation into 3D Gaussian Splatting, enabling scene understanding alongside photorealistic rendering.

papers.title: GaussianNVS: Novel View Synthesis with Constrained Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: GaussianNVS improves novel view synthesis by imposing geometric constraints on Gaussian primitives, reducing artifacts in challenging view extrapolation scenarios.

papers.title: RelightableGS: Intrinsic Decomposition with Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: RelightableGS enables intrinsic image decomposition and relighting using 3D Gaussian Splatting as the underlying scene representation.

papers.title: GaussianDepth: Monocular Depth Estimation with Gaussian Splatting Supervision
papers.summary: GaussianDepth uses 3D Gaussian Splatting as a supervision signal for monocular depth estimation, improving accuracy through geometric consistency.

papers.title: StereoGS: Stereo Matching with Gaussian Splatting Fusion
papers.summary: StereoGS fuses stereo matching with 3D Gaussian Splatting for improved depth estimation and view synthesis in stereo vision applications.

papers.title: GaussianSfM: Structure-from-Motion with Gaussian Primitives
papers.summary: GaussianSfM integrates Gaussian primitives into structure-from-motion pipelines, enabling dense reconstruction during camera tracking.

papers.title: CompressedGS: Efficient Storage for 3D Gaussian Splatting Models
papers.summary: CompressedGS presents compression techniques for 3D Gaussian Splatting models, reducing storage requirements by 10x with minimal quality impact.

papers.title: GaussianInpainting: Scene Completion with Generative Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: GaussianInpainting combines generative models with 3D Gaussian Splatting for high-quality scene completion and inpainting in unobserved regions.

papers.title: MirrorGS: Handling Reflections in 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: MirrorGS addresses the challenging problem of mirror and glossy reflections in 3D Gaussian Splatting through specialized primitive types.

papers.title: GaussianEditing: Interactive Editing of 3D Gaussian Splatting Scenes
papers.summary: GaussianEditing provides intuitive editing tools for 3D Gaussian Splatting scenes, supporting object manipulation, texture editing, and scene composition.

papers.title: OutdoorGS: Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting for Outdoor Environments
papers.summary: OutdoorGS enhances 3D Gaussian Splatting for challenging outdoor conditions including varying weather, lighting, and seasonal changes.

papers.title: StreamingGS: Progressive Streaming of 3D Gaussian Splatting Models
papers.summary: StreamingGS enables progressive loading and streaming of large 3D Gaussian Splatting models, supporting interactive applications with limited bandwidth.

papers.title: Holi-Spatial: Holistic Spatial Intelligence from Video Streams
papers.summary: Holi-Spatial introduces a comprehensive framework for building spatial intelligence from continuous video streams, integrating memory, reasoning, and prediction capabilities.

papers.title: LagMemo: Language-Guided 3D Gaussian Memory Systems
papers.summary: LagMemo presents a language-guided memory system built on 3D Gaussian Splatting, enabling natural language queries over spatial memories.

papers.title: SpatialMemoryNet: Neural Architectures for Long-Term Spatial Memory
papers.summary: SpatialMemoryNet proposes specialized neural architectures for maintaining long-term spatial memories in embodied agents, supporting efficient retrieval and update.

papers.title: Memorize-3D: Persistent 3D Scene Memory for Navigation
papers.summary: Memorize-3D creates persistent 3D scene memories that support long-term navigation and spatial reasoning in complex indoor environments.

papers.title: EpisodicSpatialMemory: Event-Based Spatial Memory for Agents
papers.summary: EpisodicSpatialMemory organizes spatial memories as episodic events, enabling agents to recall and reason about specific spatial experiences.

papers.title: HierarchicalSpatialMemory: Multi-Scale Spatial Representation Learning
papers.summary: HierarchicalSpatialMemory learns spatial representations at multiple scales, from local object arrangements to global scene layouts.

papers.title: SpatialRAG: Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Spatial Memory
papers.summary: SpatialRAG combines retrieval-augmented generation with spatial memory, enabling grounded language generation based on remembered spatial contexts.

papers.title: TemporalSpatialMemory: Time-Aware Spatial Memory for Dynamic Environments
papers.summary: TemporalSpatialMemory incorporates temporal information into spatial memories, supporting reasoning about how environments change over time.

papers.title: SpatialMemoryTransformer: Attention-Based Spatial Memory
papers.summary: SpatialMemoryTransformer applies transformer architectures to spatial memory, enabling efficient attention over large-scale spatial representations.

papers.title: CrossModalSpatialMemory: Vision-Language Spatial Memory Integration
papers.summary: CrossModalSpatialMemory integrates visual and linguistic information into unified spatial memories, supporting multimodal spatial reasoning.

papers.title: SpatialMemoryConsolidation: Sleep-Inspired Memory Consolidation
papers.summary: SpatialMemoryConsolidation applies sleep-inspired consolidation to spatial memories, improving retention and generalization.

papers.title: ActiveSpatialMemory: Goal-Directed Spatial Memory Acquisition
papers.summary: ActiveSpatialMemory enables agents to actively acquire and update spatial memories based on task goals and information needs.

papers.title: SpatialMemoryGraph: Graph-Based Spatial Memory Organization
papers.summary: SpatialMemoryGraph organizes spatial memories as graphs, capturing spatial relationships and supporting efficient graph-based reasoning.

papers.title: CompressedSpatialMemory: Efficient Encoding for Large-Scale Memory
papers.summary: CompressedSpatialMemory introduces compression techniques for large-scale spatial memories, enabling efficient storage and retrieval.

papers.title: SpatialMemoryPrediction: Predictive Spatial Memory Models
papers.summary: SpatialMemoryPrediction builds predictive models over spatial memories, anticipating future spatial configurations and enabling proactive planning.

papers.title: SpatialMemoryFusion: Multi-Agent Spatial Memory Sharing
papers.summary: SpatialMemoryFusion enables multiple agents to share and fuse their spatial memories, creating comprehensive collective spatial understanding.

papers.title: SpatialMemoryForgetting: Intelligent Forgetting in Spatial Memory
papers.summary: SpatialMemoryForgetting implements intelligent forgetting mechanisms for spatial memories, maintaining relevant information while discarding outdated data.

papers.title: SpatialMemoryAttention: Selective Attention for Spatial Memory
papers.summary: SpatialMemoryAttention implements selective attention mechanisms for spatial memory, focusing computational resources on task-relevant regions.

papers.title: SpatialMemoryUpdate: Incremental Update Strategies for Spatial Memory
papers.summary: SpatialMemoryUpdate presents efficient incremental update strategies for spatial memories, supporting real-time environment monitoring.

papers.title: SpatialMemoryQuery: Natural Language Queries for Spatial Memory
papers.summary: SpatialMemoryQuery enables natural language queries over spatial memories, supporting complex spatial reasoning through conversational interfaces.

papers.title: Kinema4D: Kinematic 4D World Modeling for Video Understanding
papers.summary: Kinema4D builds 4D world models with explicit kinematic understanding, enabling physics-aware video analysis and prediction.

papers.title: Phys4D: Physics-Consistent 4D Scene Reconstruction and Prediction
papers.summary: Phys4D enforces physical consistency in 4D scene reconstruction and prediction, improving realism in dynamic scene understanding.

papers.title: Omni-WorldBench: Comprehensive Benchmark for World Model Evaluation
papers.summary: Omni-WorldBench provides a comprehensive benchmark for evaluating world models across diverse tasks including prediction, planning, and reasoning.

papers.title: SimWorld: Physics and Social World Simulators for AI Training
papers.summary: SimWorld presents integrated physics and social world simulators for training AI agents with realistic environment dynamics.

papers.title: Thinking in Dynamics: MLLM Reasoning in 4D Physical Worlds
papers.summary: Thinking in Dynamics enables MLLMs to reason about physical dynamics in 4D worlds, supporting temporal and causal understanding.

papers.title: WorldModelTransformer: Transformer-Based World Modeling
papers.summary: WorldModelTransformer applies transformer architectures to world modeling, enabling scalable learning of environment dynamics.

papers.title: HierarchicalWorldModel: Multi-Scale World Representations
papers.summary: HierarchicalWorldModel learns world representations at multiple scales, capturing both fine-grained dynamics and global trends.

papers.title: InteractiveWorldModel: Learning Through Interaction
papers.summary: InteractiveWorldModel learns world dynamics through active interaction, improving sample efficiency and model accuracy.

papers.title: LanguageWorldModel: Language-Guided World Modeling
papers.summary: LanguageWorldModel incorporates language guidance into world modeling, enabling human-instructed learning of environment dynamics.

papers.title: ProbabilisticWorldModel: Uncertainty-Aware World Modeling
papers.summary: ProbabilisticWorldModel explicitly models uncertainty in world predictions, supporting robust planning under uncertainty.

papers.title: WorldModelFusion: Combining Multiple World Models
papers.summary: WorldModelFusion combines multiple specialized world models into unified predictions, leveraging diverse modeling approaches.

papers.title: WorldModelMemory: Memory-Augmented World Models
papers.summary: WorldModelMemory augments world models with external memory, enabling long-horizon predictions and episodic recall.

papers.title: VisualWorldModel: Learning World Models from Visual Input
papers.summary: VisualWorldModel learns world dynamics directly from visual observations, without requiring explicit state representations.

papers.title: WorldModelPlanning: Integrating World Models with Planning
papers.summary: WorldModelPlanning tightly integrates world models with planning algorithms, enabling model-predictive control and long-term planning.

papers.title: WorldModelTransfer: Transfer Learning for World Models
papers.summary: WorldModelTransfer applies transfer learning to world models, enabling rapid adaptation to new environments with limited data.

papers.title: WorldModelDistillation: Knowledge Distillation for Efficient World Models
papers.summary: WorldModelDistillation applies knowledge distillation to create efficient world models suitable for real-time applications.

papers.title: WorldModelCurriculum: Curriculum Learning for World Models
papers.summary: WorldModelCurriculum applies curriculum learning to world model training, progressively increasing prediction horizon and complexity.

papers.title: WorldModelExploration: Exploration-Driven World Model Learning
papers.summary: WorldModelExploration uses intrinsic motivation and exploration to improve world model learning in unknown environments.

papers.title: WorldModelCorrection: Error Correction in World Model Predictions
papers.summary: WorldModelCorrection implements error correction mechanisms for world model predictions, improving long-term prediction accuracy.

papers.title: WorldModelGeneralization: Generalization Benchmarks for World Models
papers.summary: WorldModelGeneralization provides benchmarks and analysis for world model generalization to novel situations and environments.

papers.title: ST-VLA: Spatio-Temporal Vision-Language-Action Model
papers.summary: ST-VLA introduces spatio-temporal reasoning to vision-language-action models, enabling better understanding of dynamic environments for embodied tasks.

papers.title: StemVLA: VLA with 3D Geometry and 4D History
papers.summary: StemVLA combines vision-language-action modeling with 3D geometric understanding and 4D temporal history for improved embodied AI performance.

papers.title: ABot-M0: Autonomous Mobile Manipulation Robot
papers.summary: ABot-M0 presents an integrated system for autonomous mobile manipulation, combining navigation, perception, and manipulation capabilities.

papers.title: 3DGSNav: 3D Gaussian Splatting Navigation with VLM
papers.summary: 3DGSNav combines 3D Gaussian Splatting with vision-language models for semantic navigation in complex environments.

papers.title: PAWS: Large-Scale Articulated Perception for Manipulation
papers.summary: PAWS presents large-scale articulated perception capabilities for manipulation tasks, enabling robots to understand and interact with articulated objects.

papers.title: HyReach: Vision-Guided Hybrid Manipulator Arm
papers.summary: HyReach presents a vision-guided hybrid manipulator arm combining serial and parallel mechanisms for improved dexterity and reach.

papers.title: Dex4D: Dexterous Manipulation with 4D Understanding
papers.summary: Dex4D enables dexterous manipulation through 4D spatio-temporal understanding of objects and environments.

papers.title: PhotoAgent: Robot with Spatial Aesthetic Understanding
papers.summary: PhotoAgent equips robots with spatial aesthetic understanding for photography assistance and artistic scene composition.

papers.title: EmbodiedReasoning: Physical Reasoning for Embodied Agents
papers.summary: EmbodiedReasoning develops physical reasoning capabilities for embodied agents, supporting common sense understanding of object interactions.

papers.title: MultiAgentEmbodiment: Learning Embodiment for Multiple Agents
papers.summary: MultiAgentEmbodiment learns shared embodiment representations for multiple agents, enabling transfer and collaboration.

papers.title: EmbodiedSimulation: Learning Through Embodied Simulation
papers.summary: EmbodiedSimulation enables agents to learn through self-generated embodied simulations, improving sample efficiency.

papers.title: EmbodiedCuriosity: Curiosity-Driven Embodied Learning
papers.summary: EmbodiedCuriosity applies curiosity-driven exploration to embodied learning, encouraging agents to discover novel states and interactions.

papers.title: EmbodiedLanguage: Language-Guided Embodied Task Learning
papers.summary: EmbodiedLanguage enables language-guided learning of embodied tasks, allowing humans to instruct and correct robot behaviors.

papers.title: EmbodiedImitation: Learning Embodied Skills Through Imitation
papers.summary: EmbodiedImitation develops imitation learning approaches for embodied skills, enabling rapid skill acquisition from demonstrations.

papers.title: EmbodiedMemory: Memory Systems for Embodied Agents
papers.summary: EmbodiedMemory develops specialized memory systems for embodied agents, supporting long-term task learning and environment memorization.

papers.title: EmbodiedPlanning: Task Planning for Embodied Agents
papers.summary: EmbodiedPlanning develops task planning algorithms for embodied agents, enabling decomposition and execution of complex goals.

papers.title: EmbodiedSafety: Safe Exploration for Embodied Agents
papers.summary: EmbodiedSafety implements safety mechanisms for embodied exploration, preventing dangerous actions during learning.

papers.title: EmbodiedTransfer: Transfer Learning Across Embodiments
papers.summary: EmbodiedTransfer enables transfer of learned skills across different robot embodiments with varying morphologies.

papers.title: EmbodiedCollaboration: Multi-Robot Collaboration
papers.summary: EmbodiedCollaboration develops coordination algorithms for multi-robot collaboration on shared tasks.

papers.title: EmbodiedAdaptation: Rapid Adaptation for Embodied Agents
papers.summary: EmbodiedAdaptation enables rapid adaptation of embodied agents to new environments and tasks with minimal data.

papers.title: VideoWorldModel: Generative Video World Models
papers.summary: VideoWorldModel presents generative models that learn world dynamics from video data, enabling future frame prediction and scene continuation.

papers.title: ConsistentVideo: Long-Term Consistency in Video Generation
papers.summary: ConsistentVideo addresses long-term temporal consistency in video generation through hierarchical coherence modeling.

papers.title: PhysicsVideo: Physics-Aware Video Generation
papers.summary: PhysicsVideo incorporates physical constraints into video generation, producing physically plausible motion and interactions.

papers.title: InteractiveVideo: User-Controllable Video Generation
papers.summary: InteractiveVideo enables user control over video generation through intuitive interfaces and real-time feedback.

papers.title: 3DVideoGen: 3D-Aware Video Generation
papers.summary: 3DVideoGen generates videos with consistent 3D geometry, enabling novel view synthesis and 3D editing.

papers.title: TextToVideoLong: Long-Form Video Generation from Text
papers.summary: TextToVideoLong extends text-to-video generation to long-form content through hierarchical story understanding.

papers.title: VideoInpaintingGen: Generative Video Inpainting
papers.summary: VideoInpaintingGen applies generative models to video inpainting, seamlessly filling missing regions with temporally consistent content.

papers.title: VideoSuperResolution: Generative Super-Resolution for Videos
papers.summary: VideoSuperResolution uses generative models for video super-resolution, producing high-quality upscaled videos with temporal consistency.

papers.title: VideoEditingGen: Generative Video Editing
papers.summary: VideoEditingGen enables semantic video editing through generative models, supporting text-guided modifications.

papers.title: MotionTransferVideo: Motion Transfer in Video Generation
papers.summary: MotionTransferVideo transfers motion patterns from reference videos to new subjects while preserving motion characteristics.

papers.title: VideoStyleTransfer: Style Transfer for Video Generation
papers.summary: VideoStyleTransfer applies style transfer to video generation, maintaining temporal coherence while transforming visual style.

papers.title: AudioVideoGen: Audio-Conditioned Video Generation
papers.summary: AudioVideoGen generates videos conditioned on audio input, creating visually plausible content synchronized with sound.

papers.title: SparseViewVideo: Video Generation from Sparse Views
papers.summary: SparseViewVideo generates complete videos from sparse input views, inferring missing frames through learned dynamics.

papers.title: VideoPredictionLong: Long-Horizon Video Prediction
papers.summary: VideoPredictionLong extends video prediction to long horizons through hierarchical temporal modeling.

papers.title: RealTimeVideoGen: Real-Time Video Generation
papers.summary: RealTimeVideoGen achieves real-time video generation through efficient architectures and streaming generation strategies.
